feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Service Master Template Price Column in Sap S/4Hana Public Cloud 2408
entry.content:
Hi Sapians,

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition, the service master template includes a column for price control, where the price type can be set as either "S" (Standard) or "V" (Moving Average). However, there is no column in the template for entering the standard price/moving price. On the other hand, if we use transaction MM01 to create a service, there is a field to enter the standard price, but no field for selecting the price control type.

 

This raises a question: if the standard price for a service is not maintained in the same way as it is in ECC or the on-premise version, why does the template include a price control column? Conversely, if the standard price functionality is indeed available in this edition, why isn’t there a column for entering the standard price in the service master template?

Thanks

entry.title: PARTIAL PAYEMENT WITH F110 on SAP PUBLIC CLOUD
entry.content:
Hi

Can someone tell me how to carry out the PARTIAL PAYEMENT WITH F110 on SAP PUBLIC CLOUD.

Thanks

entry.title: Sap public cloud - PIRS
entry.content:
Only one plant is fixed in maintain pir.
Other plants are not searched.
Where do I set the default settings?
I want to search other plants as well.

entry.title: How to Configure Limit Attachment file Size in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408
entry.content:
Dear All,

How to setting for limit attachment file size in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408, example i want upload document PR/PO but i want to limit file size for the document . Because in user profile setting, there no option for limit attachment file. Can anyone help me for this issue?

Regards,

entry.title: Rental condition type should auto calculate the unit price in the manage contract app.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a requirement in RE FX lease accounting, where the rental condition type should auto calculate the unit price in the manage contract app.

Current standard process:

When we insert the condition type in the “Manage Contract” app, rental condition will be added, and unit price is updated manually in the section as per below screen shot.

 

Selecting the relevant condition from the list:

When we add the condition, the unit price will show as 0 as per the standard functionality.

We enter the condition amount manually in the unit price section.

 

As per our requirement for the automate calculation based on the condition type and company code combination: The Unit Price needs to be calculated automatically based on a formula...

X represents Turbine rent

A represents No. of Wind Turbines (value of 6)

B represents MW capacity of Wind Turbines (value of 20,0000)

X will be calculated as follows (A x B = X)

6 x 20,000 = 120,000

So, X (Turbine rent) will have an automatic calculated value of 120,000.

Please let us know, what is the best way to achieve this requirement. 

your prompt response would be highly appreciated 😊

Thanks,

Karthik

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

SAP Real Estate Management

entry.title: Open new Fiscal year
entry.content: In the SAP S/4HANA public cloud version, is the opening of a new fiscal year automatic? Is the opening of a new fiscal year for Fixed Assets (FA) also automatic? I seem to be unable to find anything to check.

entry.title: How to Change Date Formats in Custom CDS Views in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Problem Statement:
In the Custom CDS View app in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, there are scenarios where a report requires a column with date values to be displayed in a specific format based on business needs. However, the app does not provide a direct function to change the date format. To address this, you can leverage a calculated column and utilize predefined functions such as CONCAT and SUBSTRING. By using these functions, you can manipulate the date values into the desired format.
I will demonstrate how to achieve this using an example to address such requirements effectively.

Solution:

Scenario:
Suppose there is a column in a standard CDS view containing date values in the MM/DD/YYYY format (Figure 1.1), but you need the date to be displayed in the DD-MM-YYYY format in your report.


Fig 1.1

Solution:
Step 1: Create a calculative column in a custom CDS.




Step 2: Copy the below code and paste in the code space and click on Apply.

concat( substring( I_BillingDocument.BillingDocumentDate, 7 , 2 ) , concat( '-' , concat( substring(I_BillingDocument.BillingDocumentDate, 5 , 2 ),concat( '-' , substring( I_BillingDocument.BillingDocumentDate, 1 , 4 ) ) )))



Explanation of code :

The SUBSTRING function used to extracts specific parts of the string based on the start position and length.
The CONCAT function is used to combine two or more strings into a single string.

SUBSTRING(I_BillingDocument.BillingDocumentDate, 7, 2) extracts the day (characters 7 and 2 as 7 is start position and 2 is the length.

SUBSTRING(I_BillingDocument.BillingDocumentDate, 5, 2) extracts the month (characters 5 and 6) as 5 is start position and 2 is the length.

SUBSTRING(I_BillingDocument.BillingDocumentDate, 1, 4) extracts the year (characters 1 through 4) as 1 is start position and 4 is the length.

The CONCAT function combines these extracted parts and inserts the '-' character as a separator between them.

Step 3: Click on Check, and once the check is complete, click on Data Browser.

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Resource Management for Project
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

SAP Project and Resource Management allows you as a resource manager to monitor and manage the resource utilization and the staffing of resource requests, ensuring optimal resource management. It allows resources to manage their profile of skills and assignments to be matched with the right kinds of projects. It also allows the project managers to create, manage, and monitor requests for resources on their projects.

This scope item is a public cloud solution delivered on the SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP). The integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud is enabled through this scope item.

How to implement this in cloud and what is the BTP service that i need to use for this Scope item?

entry.title: Maintenance Item Have Different Start Cycle
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Our customer have requirement to create maintenance plan time based. We already test and explore it and we have a question.

Can we have a different start cycle for every maintenance item ? for example : in Maintenance Plan 1 we have 3 Maintenance Items with different Technical Object/Equipment. We want to have every maintenance item to have a different start cycle. Any suggestion to this case ?

Thank You!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Asset Management

entry.title: Delete Info Record not possible
entry.content:
We tried to delete some Purchasing Info Records that we don't use but unfortunately it was not possible to delete them completely from SAP - only mark for deletion. 


When creating a new Purchase Requisition the deleted Purchasing Info Record is still being automatically assigned to the Purchase Requisition, which creates chaos and additional manual work for users. 


Is there any possibility to delete the PIR completely from the database?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Credit don't rechecked after modification of the sales order
entry.content:
The customer credit master data was not maintained before the creation of the sales order, and after the customer credit master data was supplemented and the sales order was modified, the credit was still not checked

  1. Initially the customer did not maintain credit master data
  2. Create a sales order, this time the sales order has no credit check
  3. Customer master data Maintain credit master data
  4. Modify the sales order, at this time the credit should be rechecked, but it was not checked

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to terminate an employee in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We're currently using an SAP on-premise system, and in it, a lot of Personnel Administration (PA) functionalities. We're planning to move to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition though, and with the migration, we have a doubt.

In the on-premise system, we have the termination action to terminate an employment and update the employment status to withdrawn or inactive. We would like to know then:

  • What's the process to terminate (not delete) an employee and have its status set to inactive in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

Thanks,
Implementation experts


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S4 HANA cloud,How to use the SUM function in CDS?
entry.content:
S4 HANA cloud,How to use the SUM function in CDS?

The consultant added the calculation field to the CDS and used the SUM function and the group by function in the filter. As a result, we got the value of the total.
Does this comply with SAP specifications? Is there another way to help advisors calculate totals in CDS?

entry.title: #COE#BUMA - Cost Center Budget Report and Project Budget Report
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

Would like to get your insights on how these two apps (Cost Center Budget Report and Project Budget Report) are working in S4 Hana Public Cloud. We tried to open the app and display the uploaded Plan Amount in Import Financial Data app but it is not showing any balances. But when we checked P/L Plan/Actual Report, the data can be displayed.

Thank you,

Marife

entry.title: Publish RFQ from custom behavior class save method
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have a requirement to develop custom application in HANA Public Cloud where user selects specific supplier to approve then it should automatically publish RFQ. Lo_http_client being generated but session getting terminated at lo_http_client->execute method and not catching at exceptions. Request your valuable inputs to take it forward. below is the sample code for your reference written in Behavior save/create method. Thank you
 
lo_url = 'https://{hostname}/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_RFQ_PROCESS_SRV/SubmitForApproval?RequestForQuotation='7000000010''

lo_http_client = cl_web_http_client_manager=>create_by_http_destination(

i_destination = cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_url( lo_url ) ).
Try

DATA(lo_response) = lo_http_client->execute(

i_method = if_web_http_client=>post ).

CATCH cx_web_message_error cx_web_http_client_error cx_http_dest_provider_error. "#EC NO_HANDLER

" data(lv_msg) = lo_Response->get_text( ).

ENDTRY.

entry.title: Update S4 Hana Public Cloud - Outbound Delivery Header and Item using standard APIs
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am using the standard API (Outbound Delivery (A2X)) from the standard communication scenario "SAP_COM_0106". In this API we are attempting the PATCH request to update the outbound delivery and the request endpoint and body of the request are as below

I want to update the "Shipping Notes for Customer" value in the Header, which is a notes field.

At the item level, I want to update the Item Quantity. 

https://myxxxxxx-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_OUTBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV/A_OutbDeliveryHeader('xxxxxxxx')

Body:

{    "CustomerShippingInstruction": "Handle with care",    "DeliveryDocumentItem": [        {            "DeliveryDocument": "xxxxxxxx",            "DeliveryDocumentItem": "10",            "ActualDeliveryQuantity": "25.000"        }    ]} 

In the request header parameter, I am passing the x-csrf-token value I attained from the GET request. I am using user-based authentication and below are the user credentials

I am receiving the "403 Forbidden Request" response for the above request. How I can handle this request and I need to fix this as soon as possible.

Needs to fix this and get the update call working to the outbound deliveries in to the system. Currently testing this in POSTMAN.

Thanks,

Hanu K

entry.title: 過帳規則無法自動產生
entry.content:
HI All

我目前在建立YBM1類型的生產訂單時出現過帳規則無法自動產生的錯誤訊息，錯誤代碼是CO630，

結算：無法自動建立分配規則
訊息號碼 CO630

Diagnosis
The distribution rule could not be created automatically. When a production order is created, the system tries to create a distribution rule automatically. If this is not possible there may be several explanations, for example:

the settlement profile for your order type does not permit the recipient for whom a distribution rule is to be created automatically
several recipients are entered as compulsory recipients for the settlement profile
the material that is produced is not valuated. Therefore the system cannot generate a distribution rule with the recipient material.
For an operation-related posting the automatic creation of the distribution rule is a prerequisite since the manual creation of the distribution rule is not supported.

Procedure
Check which of the above reasons is true and change your settlement profile if necessary. If an order is to be created for a material without valuation then the distribution rule must be maintained manually.

我使用的是標準的工單類型YBM1，理論上應該是能夠自動產生過帳規則，想問一下是甚麼原因導致的?

另外想問一下這個過帳規則該怎麼指派給生產訂單?在IMG"定義生產訂單類型"裡面沒有看到相對應的欄位，

謝謝。

entry.title: 匯入財務計畫數據問題
entry.content:
HI All

想請教我已經透過APP"匯入財務計畫數據" 將EPPM專案的計畫數據上傳到ERP中，

我能夠在APP"顯示財務計畫資料"中看到我上傳的結果，但我無法在APP"專案 計畫/實際"的報表中看到我上傳的結果，

我選擇的兩個規劃種類分別是PLN(計劃)及CPM，

謝謝。

entry.title: 專案庫存銷售
entry.content:
HI All

情境為採購入庫時，存貨入到專案庫存(Q)，直接銷售此專案庫存(Q)

有參考了論壇上的問題"Publice cloud是否可以直接銷售出貨專案庫存(601+Q)"中提到的內容，

但遇到一樣的問題無法在出貨時選到專案庫存Q的存貨，但在庫存概觀等報表中是能夠看到專案庫存的，

謝謝。

entry.title: Change Documents List for TRM transactions
entry.content:
• In current system SAP ECC, they configure that certain items cannot be changed after settlement for TRM transactions.
  • In S/4 HC we cannot configure same as ECC so almost all items can be changed even after settlement for TRM transactions.
  • It is the original issue, but we understand it cannot be solved in a short time, so we have investigated a workaround for this issue. 
  • For the workaround, at least we need Change Documents List Report. 
  • We understand that we can display Change Documents for each Transaction one by one, but it cannot be the solution because users cannot check one by one and there is a major internal audit problem.
  • We believe you understand the issue and will provide Change Documents List Report like ECC and/or additional solutions.
    Please let me know your plans and schedule.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
